steps.title: Use subject matter only
steps.content: The requested contrast is about what the two prints depict. Doi's Rooftops shows a tranquil everyday scene, while Tana's Amanzi Amthatha presents an explicitly political scene.

steps.title: Reject technique and date contrasts
steps.content: A and B focus on printing technique rather than subject matter, and B also misstates the relationship between linocuts and relief prints. D contrasts years. The remaining choice directly contrasts the works' subject matter. The answer is C.
